goal: Unlock the FE v6 Export workflow by wiring the desktop app to existing export APIs after an AgentPackage exists.
head: 9c21fda
blocked_scope: Changing export manifest, exported runtime, adapter loading, Docker image behavior, benchmark/package/playground contracts, M6 review, release-readiness, model catalog, or evidence policy
Inventing export artifacts, hashes, runtime smoke evidence, benchmark results, or package evidence
Downloading or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may only add frontend API-client routes and desktop UI/model/mock/e2e coverage for the v6 ExportPanel using existing backend export APIs, plus LLM handoff docs, completion log, and PABCD contract.
required_commands: rg -n -- "projectExport|createExport|getExport|revealExportArtifact|Export workflow|Start zip export|Export job accepted|manifest_sha256|artifact_sha256|zip export" apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/main.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/mockApi.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/m1_happy_path.test.mjs docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
required_evidence: Desktop route parsing and workflow stepper expose /projects/{id}/export as the Export workflow route after an AgentPackage exists.
Export page uses existing createExport, getExport, and revealExportArtifact APIs and never creates or edits export artifacts locally.
Browser happy path can reach Export after Package, submit a zip export through the mock API, and see queued/completed export manifest and artifact hash state.
Existing backend export API focused tests still pass.
Docs continue to state that M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.
executed_verification_commands: rg -n -- "projectExport|createExport|getExport|revealExportArtifact|Export workflow|Start zip export|Export job accepted|manifest_sha256|artifact_sha256|zip export" apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/main.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/mockApi.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/m1_happy_path.test.mjs docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
warnings: This gate submits export through existing APIs in mock/browser tests only; it does not produce release export evidence, runtime smoke evidence, Docker evidence, or endpoint transcripts.
apps/desktop/src/main.mjs is 921 lines after this phase, which is a 900+ God File soft warning but below the 1000-line blocker.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO.

phase_notes.plan: Use the canonical FE v6 ExportPanel as the target and connect desktop Export to existing export APIs after package readiness.
phase_notes.audit: The backend export APIs and tests exist, but the desktop shell still keeps Export locked, so the v6 workflow cannot progress from AgentPackage to export job submission and export status review.
phase_notes.build: Extend desktop route parsing/workflow readiness/API client, add Export page rendering/zip submit/export status/reveal action, update mock API and e2e happy path.
phase_notes.check: Run desktop model/API-client tests, browser happy path, existing backend export focused tests, evidence search, bootstrap m1-smoke, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this Export workflow unlock phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Unlock the FE v6 Export workflow route in the desktop app using existing export APIs; update focused tests/mock/docs/PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No backend/API/schema/DB/worker/runtime changes, no release GO claim, no M6 review GO edits, no model/catalog/training/benchmark/package/playground/export evidence policy changes, no downloaded weights/adapters/images/evidence bundles, no exported runtime implementation changes in this phase.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.plan: Use the canonical FE v6 ExportPanel as the target and connect desktop Export to existing export APIs after package readiness.
